---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a platform, template, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like

A clear description of the feature.

## Why

What problem does it solve, or what does it make possible.

## Platform or template?

If this is a new platform or template, note the target sizes, safe area, and how the text should be laid out. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the contract.

## Alternatives

Anything you already tried or considered.
